headline: Diverse Offerings & Strategic Investments Aid OMC Amid Stiff Rivalry
summary: OMC leverages a diverse service portfolio and digital investments to drive growth, but weak liquidity, stiff competition and a Q4 earnings miss raise concerns.

headline: Is Trade Desk (TTD) One Of The Best Affordable Growth Stocks Right Now?
summary: The Trade Desk, Inc. (NASDAQ:TTD) is one of the 10 Best Affordable Growth Stocks to Buy for the Next 5 Years. James Heaney from Jefferies maintained a Hold rating on The Trade Desk, Inc. (NASDAQ:TTD), along with the price target of $22 on March 24. He said that Omnicom is carrying out an independent audit […]
